findings.location: s8 — compositeKeyRadioButtonタグ、compositeKeyCheckboxタグ (Pattern 1 JSP code comment)
findings.description: The JSP code comment constraint for Pattern 1 is missing: 「name の名称は任意だが、 keyNames の名称と選択された複合キーのプロパティ名は一致させる必要がある。」 This is a required implementation constraint — if the keyNames values don't match the composite key property names on the Form, the tag will not function correctly.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP comment: ※name の名称は任意だが、 keyNames の名称と選択された複合キーのプロパティ名は一致させる必要がある。

findings.location: s8 — compositeKeyRadioButtonタグ、compositeKeyCheckboxタグ (Pattern 2 JSP code comment)
findings.description: The JSP code comment constraint for Pattern 2 (CompositeKey class pattern) is missing: 「name は必ず CompositeKey を表す名称とする。」 This is a required implementation constraint specific to the CompositeKey class pattern that distinguishes it from Pattern 1.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP comment: ※name は必ず CompositeKey を表す名称とする。

findings.description: The section content is a fabricated meta-description: 「RST文書内でpasswordタグセクションとradioButtonタグセクションの間に位置する区切り。このセクション自体にコンテンツはなく...」 The source file contains no such statement; this is generated commentary about document structure.
findings.source_evidence: Source has no content between the passwordタグ and radioButtonタグ headings — just the heading markup itself.

findings.description: The section content is a fabricated meta-description: 「RST文書内でcheckboxタグセクションとcompositeKeyRadioButton/compositeKeyCheckboxタグセクションの間に位置する区切り...」 The source contains no such statement.
findings.source_evidence: Source has no content between the checkboxタグ and compositeKeyタグ headings.

findings.description: The section content is a fabricated meta-description: 「フォーム内の入力要素カスタムタグに関するドキュメントの末尾セクション...」 The source file contains no such statement; the document simply ends after the last section.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends after the List型変数 section HTML output examples; no end-of-document marker or commentary exists.

findings.description: The only hint is 「passwordタグとradioButtonタグの中間」, which is a fabricated positional descriptor that no user would search for. This section represents no real content from the source and provides no useful retrieval signal.
findings.source_evidence: Section s3 corresponds to no source content; the hint does not correspond to any term in the source file.
